title: Tempting Silky Uruguayan Yogurt Pudding
description: A rich and creamy dessert featuring Greek yogurt and a hint of bitterness, cooked to perfection in a salt block vessel. This ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly dish is sure to satisfy any sweet tooth.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the papillote paper into 4 equal squares.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the yogurt, honey, and lemon juice until smooth.
Pour the mixture onto the center of each papillote square.
Fold the papillote paper over the filling to form a triangle and press the edges to seal.
Place the salt block in the oven for 10 minutes to preheat.
Remove the salt block from the oven and place the papillote triangles on top.
Drizzle the water over the papillote triangles and sprinkle with black sesame seeds.
Return the salt block to the oven and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the pudding from the oven and let cool to room temperature.
Melt the dark chocolate chips in a double boiler and drizzle over the cooled pudding.
